passives.name: Practice Makes Lethal
passives.effects: Basic attacks {{tip|on-attack}} grant {{as|{{rd|{{fd|0.4}}%|{{fd|0.2}}%}} critical strike chance}} permanently, stacking up to {{rd|63|125}} times (capped at {{as|25% critical strike chance}}).

passives.name: Flurry
passives.effects: Launching a basic attack against an enemy champion grants you {{as|30% '''bonus''' attack speed}} for 6 seconds (30 second cooldown, reduced by 1 second {{tip|on-hit}} and 2 seconds if the attack {{tip|critical strike|critically strikes}}).

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks permanently grant critical strike chance (0.4% melee, 0.2% ranged) up to 63/125 stacks, capped at 25% crit.
On basic attack against a champion, gain 30% bonus attack speed for 6s (30s cooldown; reduced by 1s on-hit and 2s on crit).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified on-attack and Flurry timing semantics against page-level source: Practice stacks are granted on basic attack launch, and Flurry cooldown reduction is driven by hit/crit outcomes on subsequent attacks.
Stack-cap note: melee branch reaches crit cap via 63 displayed stacks due decimal rounding of per-stack gain.
